docs.title: coding_system_spec
docs.text:
﻿---
title: Document Coding System (Summary)
tags: [codes, control, manifest, rules]
---
Code format:
CH-YYYY-<Area>-<DocType>-<SEQ>-R<REV>
Areas → folders:
PP(01_Project_Plan), BA(02_Brand_Assets), WA(03_Website_App), DC(04_Docs),
DG(05_Design), CT(06_Content), DT(07_Data), EX(08_Exports), RP(09_Reports),
SP(10_Source_Packages), TL(_TOOLS)
Rules:
- Persistent code per file path; REV increments when SHA-256 changes
- SEQ increments per (Area, DocType)
- Track in 09_Reports/Document_Code_Manifest.csv
- All actions appended to 09_Reports/Document_Control_Log.csv

docs.title: merge_workflow
docs.text:
﻿---
title: Merge Workflow (Controller)
tags: [merge, changelog, normalization]
---
Inputs: backup zip + STOP form.
Outputs: *_UPDATE_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSSZ.zip, MERGE_REPORT_YYYY-MM-DD.md, updated logs.
Workflow:
- Expand incoming → ensure canonical folders
- Move top-level strays to predicted folders (type/keywords)
- Time-based precedence: newer replaces; older kept as __dup
- Append MASTER_CHANGELOG entry with counts (moved/updated/duplicated)
- Rebuild timestamped + rolling UPDATE zips

docs.title: stop_sop
docs.text:
﻿---
title: STOP SOP (Master)
tags: [sop, stop, backup, merge]
---
Purpose:
- Single source for STOP package runs.
Controller Steps:
1) Validate canonical folders (01_Project_Plan … 10_Source_Packages, _TOOLS)
2) Parse STOP form (CSV/DOCX) → append entry to 09_Reports/MASTER_CHANGELOG.md
3) Diff & merge: prefer newer timestamp; preserve older as __dup
4) Normalize misplaced files into the correct canonical folder
5) Rebuild UPDATE zip + 09_Reports/MERGE_REPORT_YYYY-MM-DD.md
6) Include latest STOP form + templates in bundle
Safety:
- No destructive edits; every change logged in MASTER_CHANGELOG + Control Log.

docs.title: trey_persona
docs.text:
﻿---
title: Trey Persona — Personal Assistant
tags: [persona, trey, assistant, kb]
---
Role:
- Personal assistant avatar for Chapterhouse projects.
- Uses KnowledgeBase_AI notes as grounding.
Behavior:
- Task-focused, concise, structured checklists, status updates.
- Defers generative prose quality checks to validation phase.
Knowledge:
- Primary: KnowledgeBase_AI/*.md, *.txt
- Secondary: Project bundles (Docs, SOPs, Reports)

docs.title: Welcome to Trey
docs.text: Trey is your personal assistant. He learns from every note in this folder.
